## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] README and CHANGELOG updated, if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, `results-*.json`, `.har` files, screenshots, or raw probe evidence committed
- [ ] Detection logic in `probe-core.mjs` is preserved, or the change is linked to an approved issue
- [ ] A/B Direct-vs-GSA methodology is preserved
